data.name: Top Performer
data.description: One who constantly gives the best at work.

data.name: Leadership Impact
data.description: To the one who always inspires and create impact.

data.name: Customer Hero
data.description: To the one who have demonstrated exceptional skills in client communication and relations.

data.name: Above & Beyond
data.description: To the person who is beyond the expectations.

data.name: High Five
data.description: For being an exceptional performer and an inspiration.

data.name: Leaving a Legacy
data.description: One who had set a trademark in the organization.

data.name: Team Player
data.description: For the one who supports and collaborates the work of the team.

data.name: Rockstar Rookie
data.description: Beginner who excels and exceeds the expectations.

data.name: All Day Everyday
data.description: For the one who has immaculate attendance.

data.name: HR Wizard
data.description: For pulling solutions out of their hats
